description: Paste clipboard images to remote terminal via SSH. Works with any terminal-based AI tool.
command.upload.editor.title: Upload Image from Clipboard (Editor)
command.upload.terminal.title: Upload Image from Clipboard (Terminal)
config.title: Remote Terminal Image Paste
config.keybinding.description: Keyboard shortcut for uploading images from clipboard
config.retentionDays.description: Days to keep uploaded images before auto-cleanup (0 = never delete)
config.clearClipboardAfterUpload.descrip: Clear clipboard after successfully uploading an image
config.quoteStyle.description: Quote style for file path when pasting
config.useForwardSlashes.description: Use forward slashes (/) in path (recommended for cross-platform compatibility)
config.simulateRealPaste.description: Simulate real paste event using bracketed paste sequences. This triggers terminal tools' paste handlers (e.g., OpenCode's path-to-image detection). Enable if you want the pasted path to be recognized as an image by terminal-based AI tools.
config.compositePasteFormat.description: When Simulate Real Paste is enabled, also paste a plain text path wrapped in brackets. Result: [image visual] [/path/to/image.png]. This allows language models to read the image via explicit path (using look_at tool), even without visual capabilities.
config.showNotification.description: Show notification after uploading image. Disable for immersive experience.
